zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bland於1572年9月28日出生在英國艾可可爾斯特時，他的父親Adam Thomas Bland44歲，母親Joan Atkyns42歲。他於1600年12月7日與Isabella Drake在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福萊斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1668年1月6日在美國麻薩諸塞州度可斯韋斯特 迪斯波利馬薩也斯 文也亞德享年95歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州伍斯特蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place called Bland in Sedburgh, Yorkshire, the origin of which is uncertain. Possibly it is from Old English (ge)bland ‘storm, commotion’ (from blandan ‘to blend or mingle’), with reference to its exposed situation. The modern English adjective bland did not come into English (from Latin) until the 15th century, and is therefore unlikely to have given rise to surnames.
French: nickname from Old French blant ‘flattering’ (from Latin blandus).

variants.name: Blandin
meanings: Altered form of   Blanding  , a surname of English origin.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bland was born on 28 September 1572, in Colchester, Essex, England, his father, Adam Thomas Bland, was 44 and his mother, Joan Atkyns, was 42. He married Isabella Drake on 7 December 1600, in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 6 January 1668, in Martha's Vineyard, West Tisbury, Dukes, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 95, and was buried in Lancaster, Worcester, Massachusetts, United States.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bland nasceu em 28 de setembro de 1572, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Thomas Bland, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Joan Atkyns, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Drake em 7 de dezembro de 1600, em Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1668, em Martha's Vineyard, West Tisbury, Dukes, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 95 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancaster, Worcester, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bland родился 28 сентября 1572 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam Thomas Bland было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Atkyns, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Drake 7 декабря 1600 г. в местности фристон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 6 января 1668 г. в местности марта'с ваиниард, вест тисбури, дукесь, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкастир, ворсестир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bland nació el 28 de septiembre de 1572, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Thomas Bland, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Joan Atkyns, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Isabella Drake el 7 de diciembre de 1600, en Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de enero de 1668, en Martha's Vineyard, West Tisbury, Dukes, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultado en Lancaster, Worcester, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
